summary: Completed comprehensive testing of REFMEX landing page with blue/white theme. All major features working correctly including WhatsApp integration, navigation, and backend APIs.

ui_bugs.issue: Position selection dropdown has minor interaction issues during automated testing

passed_tests: Floating WhatsApp button appears on scroll
WhatsApp buttons for all 3 offices working
Navbar smooth scroll to all sections
Hero section with white logo and blue/white theme
About section with blue floating card
Contact section with 3 offices and Google Maps links
Backend blog API with seeding and category filtering
Theme change from black/gold to blue/white successfully implemented
